case_title: MARK GRAHAM VS. PORTOLA DIMENSIONAL SYSTEMS CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAHAM, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT PORTOLA DIMENSIONAL SYSTEMS CORPORATION GEROLA, HUMBERTO (AS JOINT EMPLOYERS) GEROLA, WOLFGANG ( AS JOINT EMPLOYERS) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
